scope: Pass B full-surface expansion against the published OpenAPI spec (https://developers.thinkific.com/openapi/thinkific-admin-api-v1.yaml, fetched 2026-07-03): 13 read streams (the original legacy-parity courses stream plus users/enrollments/collections/products/orders/coupons/promotions/groups/instructors/course_reviews/custom_profile_field_definitions/site_scripts/product_publish_requests) and 28 write actions covering user/enrollment/coupon/collection/group/instructor/promotion/site-script/course-review lifecycle plus category-membership and publish-request approval workflows. Excluded: single-object detail endpoints that duplicate an already-covered list stream's record shape, Bundles (no list endpoint exists — Thinkific's own API only exposes bundle-by-id/bundle-sub-resource routes with no discovery path), Chapters/Contents (detail-only with no top-level list endpoint; only reachable via a course's chapter_ids, which would require sub-resource fan-out this pass does not implement), group-analyst assignment sub-resources, external orders/transactions (a distinct manual-payment-recording workflow, not a general-purpose write this dialect models cleanly), and user-authentication-provider lookups.

excluded.reason: single-course detail; identical record shape to the courses list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
chapters are only reachable per-course via this sub-resource path with no top-level list endpoint; would require sub-resource fan-out over every course id, not implemented this pass
single-user detail; identical record shape to the users list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-sign-on provider authentication-record lookup for one user/provider pair, not a syncable object stream
single-enrollment detail; identical record shape to the enrollments list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-collection detail; identical record shape to the collections list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
a per-collection filtered view of the same records already covered by the products stream (the collections list stream's own product_ids field names the association)
single-product detail; identical record shape to the products list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
a related-products cross-reference view of the same records already covered by the products stream
single-order detail; identical record shape to the orders list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
a batch-of-many variant of create_coupon's single-record shape; this dialect's write actions are single-record, and repeated create_coupon calls cover the same outcome
single-coupon detail; identical record shape to the coupons list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-course-review detail; identical record shape to the course_reviews list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-instructor detail; identical record shape to the instructors list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-group detail; identical record shape to the groups list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
per-group analyst-assignment sub-resource list, only reachable per-group with no top-level discovery endpoint; would require sub-resource fan-out over every group id, not implemented this pass
assigns analysts to a specific group's analyst sub-resource; a narrower variant of group-membership management not modeled as a top-level write this pass
removes a specific analyst from a specific group's analyst sub-resource; same narrow-scope reasoning as the analyst-assignment endpoints above
the inverse (user-centric) analyst-group-assignment endpoint; same narrow-scope reasoning as the group-analyst sub-resource endpoints above
the inverse (user-centric) analyst-group-removal endpoint; same narrow-scope reasoning as the group-analyst sub-resource endpoints above
a coupon-code-keyed lookup of the same promotion records already covered by the promotions stream
single-promotion detail; identical record shape to the promotions list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-site-script detail; identical record shape to the site_scripts list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-publish-request detail; identical record shape to the product_publish_requests list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream

no list endpoint exists to enumerate bundle ids at all (Thinkific's own API only exposes bundle-by-id and its sub-resources); a lone detail-by-id GET with no discovery path is not a syncable stream without an id already in hand from an external source
sub-resource of an unlistable bundle; same no-discovery-path reasoning as /bundles/{id}
sub-resource of an unlistable bundle; same no-discovery-path reasoning as /bundles/{id}
creates an enrollment scoped to an unlistable bundle id with no discovery path to obtain that id
updates enrollments scoped to an unlistable bundle id with no discovery path to obtain that id
no top-level chapters list endpoint exists; only reachable per-course via courses/{id}/chapters, itself excluded for the same sub-resource-fan-out reason
sub-resource of an unlistable chapter id; same no-discovery-path reasoning as /chapters/{id}
no top-level contents list endpoint exists; only reachable per-chapter via chapters/{id}/contents, itself excluded for the same sub-resource-fan-out reason
records a manually-completed off-platform sale as an order; a distinct bookkeeping workflow (not a general resource-lifecycle mutation) with no corresponding read stream to round-trip against
records a manual purchase transaction against an external order; same narrow bookkeeping-workflow reasoning as /external_orders
records a manual refund transaction against an external order; same narrow bookkeeping-workflow reasoning as /external_orders
